name: ping-me
description: Play a sound and show a notification when an AI response is ready.

pingMe.automaticDetection.description: Enable automatic detection of AI responses via inactivity timer. When disabled, notifications only trigger via the URI handler or the command.

pingMe.enableUriHandler.description: Enable the URI handler (vscode://yhondri.ping-me/notify) so external tools can trigger notifications via hook.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
